## Security Checklist

<!-- If this PR touches auth, input handling, LLM integration, or tool registration, check all that apply. -->

- [ ] No new PII is sent to external LLM providers without redaction
- [ ] New tools declare `requiredPermissions` correctly
- [ ] New tool marked `sensitive: true` if it accesses confidential data
- [ ] No secrets or API keys introduced in code
- [ ] CSP / security headers not weakened
- [ ] Prompt injection surface not widened
